description: An ancient town by the Li River with a history of over a thousand years, featured as the backdrop on the 20 RMB banknote. It is rustic, tranquil, and picturesque.
Located within Jingjiang Princes' City, it is the highest point in Guilin city, offering a panoramic view of the entire city from the summit.
A bamboo raft tour along the most scenic section of the Li River, passing by attractions such as Nine Horses Fresco Hill and Yellow Cloth Reflection, both featured on the 20 RMB banknote.
A historic and cultural district in Guilin, this pedestrian street combines traditional architecture, specialty snacks, and creative shops.
A quintessential drifting experience in Yangshuo, where you ride a bamboo raft through idyllic landscapes, enjoying the serene and distant beauty of the scenery.
A large-scale live-action performance directed by Zhang Yimou, set on the Li River as the stage, offering a stunning audio-visual feast.
A classic cycling route in Yangshuo, featuring picturesque countryside scenery and showcasing the iconic Guilin landscape of mountains and fields.
A lakeside park in Guilin city, offering a serene environment ideal for morning exercise and leisurely walks.
A landmark attraction in Guilin, resembling a giant elephant drinking water with its trunk, symbolizing the essence of Guilin's landscape.
A commercial pedestrian street in the center of Guilin, featuring local snacks, specialties, and nightlife, providing an authentic cultural experience.
